[Verse 1]
Holy words long preserved
For our walk in this world
They resound with God's own heart
Oh, let the ancient words impart
Words of life, words of hope
Give us strength, help us cope
In this world, where e'er we roam
Ancient words will guide us home

[Chorus]
Ancient words ever true
Changing me and changing you
We have come with open hearts
Oh, let the ancient words impart

[Verse 2]
Holy words of our faith
Handed down to this age
Came to us through sacrifice
Oh, heed the faithful words of Christ
Holy words long preserved
For our walk in this world
They resound with God's own heart
Oh, let the ancient words impart

extendedTextMessage.text:
The monster you create  today  will one day come and torment you, 

Same way the hero you create one day will come back and save you another day

One powerful statement by a leper which justifies faith 

"And he said to Jesus Christ, *if you are willing make me clean*" 
Today lord Jesus Christ  of Nazareth if you are willing show me your glory
And job said *For I know that my redeemer lives*

When the doctor tells you that you will die, you don't have to even listen to him to the extend of even believing him

Because what did the bible say 
*You will not die, but live to proclaim the words of the Lord*

When someone tells you that you will not make it in life  and that you will always be looked over. Just laugh at the person and tell the person *my bible tells me that I will be the head and not the tail*

When a pastor  prophecies to you and you feel that its not enough 
Let me tell you that, that's all he can tell you 
Remember  the bible tells us that *we know in parts and prophecy in parts*. Therefore not always will God reveal everything to the pastor therefore it's Ur duty  to look for the rest and it's right before you that's the bible which is the complete and sure word of prophcy

The only book that breathes(lives)
The holds the future
That address  and solves our issues
That is out weapon or sword
That blazes with fire 
That is the complete word of prophecy 
That has the words that brought up this world thats the word GOD 

*THE BIBLE*
Yhyh
рҹ”Ҙ
рҹҳӮ
